Html\n关键词: Html\n实体数: 2\n\n# HTML 简介\r\n\r\n**来源**: sample/html-intro\r\n\r\n**分类**: 基础入门\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 什么是 HTML\r\n\r\nHTML（HyperText Markup Language，超文本标记语言）是用于创建网页的标准标记语言。它不是一种编程语言，而是一种标记语言，用于描述网页的结构和内容。\r\n\r\n## HTML 的特点\r\n\r\n- **简单易学**：语法简单，标签易懂\r\n- **跨平台**：可在任何操作系统上浏览\r\n- **可扩展**：支持 CSS、JavaScript 等技术\r\n- **多媒体支持**：可嵌入图片、音频、视频\r\n\r\n## HTML 的应","proposed_at":1780207359,"supporters":["c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","c1507657-eae4-46c3-b156-6650993b6905","954ea923-7d81-4b95-8c6c-904bf1fbdd99"],"opponents":[],"comments":[],"status":"ConsensusReached","revisions":[]},{"id":"proposal_5e406c81-cca4-44f8-855a-d8b9829c64cb","proposer_id":"c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","proposer_name":"水灵虫","part":"Definition","content":"主题: Html\n关键词: Html, Html5\n实体数: 4\n\n# HTML 历史版本\r\n\r\n**来源**: sample/html-history\r\n\r\n**分类**: 基础入门\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 版本演变\r\n\r\n| 版本 | 年份 | 主要特性 |\r\n|------|------|----------|\r\n| HTML 1.0 | 1991 | 最初版本，仅支持基本标签 |\r\n| HTML 2.0 | 1995 | 首个正式标准 |\r\n| HTML 3.2 | 1997 | 支持表格、字体样式 |\r\n| HTML 4.01 | 1999 | 分离结构和表现，支持 CSS |\r\n| XHTML 1.0 | 2000 | 基于 XML 的 HTML","proposed_at":1780207359,"supporters":["c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","c1507657-eae4-46c3-b156-6650993b6905","954ea923-7d81-4b95-8c6c-904bf1fbdd99"],"opponents":[],"comments":[],"status":"ConsensusReached","revisions":[]},{"id":"proposal_ba67d184-92ee-4908-887c-50c1ca1f01b6","proposer_id":"c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","proposer_name":"水灵虫","part":"Definition","content":"主题: Html\n语言: Html\n关键词: Html, 属性, Div, 标签名, 值\n实体数: 8\n\n# HTML 标签基础\r\n\r\n**来源**: sample/html-tags\r\n\r\n**分类**: 基础语法\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 标签语法\r\n\r\n```html\r\n<标签名 属性 1=\"值 1\" 属性 2=\"值 2\">内容\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 示例\r\n\r\n```html\r\n

    这是一个段落

    \r\n链接\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 标签分类\r\n\r\n### 双标签（成对出现）\r\n```html\r\n

    段落

    \r\n
    ","proposed_at":1780207359,"supporters":["c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","c1507657-eae4-46c3-b156-6650993b6905","954ea923-7d81-4b95-8c6c-904bf1fbdd99"],"opponents":[],"comments":[],"status":"ConsensusReached","revisions":[]},{"id":"proposal_7bcfce87-f708-4187-8543-225d310d211d","proposer_id":"c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","proposer_name":"水灵虫","part":"Definition","content":"主题: Html\n语言: Html\n关键词: Html, Span, Img, H1, Input\n实体数: 8\n\n# HTML 区块和行内元素\r\n\r\n**来源**: sample/html-block-inline\r\n\r\n**分类**: 基础语法\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 块级元素（Block-level）\r\n\r\n块级元素独占一行，可设置宽高：\r\n\r\n```html\r\n
    块级容器
    \r\n

    段落

    \r\n

    ~

    标题\r\n
        列表\r\n
      1. 列表项\r\n 表格\r\n 表单\r\n
        区块\r\n
        文章\r\n
        页眉页脚\r\n
        导航\r\n
        侧边栏\r\n```\r\n\r","proposed_at":1780207359,"supporters":["c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","c1507657-eae4-46c3-b156-6650993b6905","954ea923-7d81-4b95-8c6c-904bf1fbdd99"],"opponents":[],"comments":[],"status":"ConsensusReached","revisions":[]},{"id":"proposal_87617251-cca0-4d4f-b28e-499507714b09","proposer_id":"c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","proposer_name":"水灵虫","part":"Definition","content":"主题: Html\n语言: Html\n关键词: Div, Class, Span, Html, 而不是\n实体数: 14\n\n# HTML Div 和 Span\r\n\r\n**来源**: sample/html-div-span\r\n\r\n**分类**: 基础语法\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## Div 元素\r\n\r\n`
        ` 是块级容器，用于分组和布局：\r\n\r\n```html\r\n
        \r\n
        \r\n

        标题

        \r\n
        \r\n
        \r\n

        内容

        \r\n
        \r\n
        \r\n ","proposed_at":1780207359,"supporters":["c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","c1507657-eae4-46c3-b156-6650993b6905","954ea923-7d81-4b95-8c6c-904bf1fbdd99"],"opponents":[],"comments":[],"status":"ConsensusReached","revisions":[]},{"id":"proposal_13ce6d07-ea88-46ba-94ec-ad75994d61c8","proposer_id":"c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","proposer_name":"水灵虫","part":"Definition","content":"主题: Html\n语言: Html, Javascript\n关键词: Div, Id, Data, Html, El\n实体数: 13\n\n# HTML 全局属性\r\n\r\n**来源**: sample/html-global-attributes\r\n\r\n**分类**: 基础语法\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 常用全局属性\r\n\r\n```html\r\n\r\n

        这是第二行。

        \r\n```\r\n\r\n## 文本样式\r\n\r\n```html\r\n

        重要文本（粗","proposed_at":1780207359,"supporters":["c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","c1507657-eae4-46c3-b156-6650993b6905","954ea923-7d81-4b95-8c6c-904bf1fbdd99"],"opponents":[],"comments":[],"status":"ConsensusReached","revisions":[]},{"id":"proposal_c30d926d-d64e-47b0-b176-4144e5a201bb","proposer_id":"c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","proposer_name":"水灵虫","part":"Definition","content":"主题: Html\n语言: Html\n关键词: Div, Html, Aria, Label, Button\n实体数: 14\n\n# HTML 无障碍访问\r\n\r\n**来源**: sample/html-accessibility\r\n\r\n**分类**: 无障碍访问\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## Alt 属性\r\n\r\n```html\r\n\r\n```\r\n\r\n## ARIA 属性\r\n\r\n```html\r\n\r\n

        ...
        \r\n

        \r\n

        张三25北京
        李四\r\n
        姓名和年龄
        张三25
        北京
        \r\n","proposed_at":1780207359,"supporters":["c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","c1507657-eae4-46c3-b156-6650993b6905","954ea923-7d81-4b95-8c6c-904bf1fbdd99"],"opponents":[],"comments":[],"status":"ConsensusReached","revisions":[]},{"id":"proposal_d2a3aec2-50b0-4954-b0b5-91b356a30590","proposer_id":"c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","proposer_name":"水灵虫","part":"Definition","content":"主题: Html\n语言: Html\n关键词: Footer, Html, Header, Article, Main\n实体数: 13\n\n# HTML 语义化标签\r\n\r\n**来源**: sample/html-semantic\r\n\r\n**分类**: 语义化标签\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## HTML5 语义化标签\r\n\r\n```html\r\n

        文章内容...

        \r\n <","proposed_at":1780207359,"supporters":["c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","c1507657-eae4-46c3-b156-6650993b6905","954ea923-7d81-4b95-8c6c-904bf1fbdd99"],"opponents":[],"comments":[],"status":"ConsensusReached","revisions":[]},{"id":"proposal_a827eec7-eede-4953-8203-81e4735f40cc","proposer_id":"c6c23fd4-cb3a-49a3-9c4e-ceb0d633bdf5","proposer_name":"水灵虫","part":"Definition","content":"主题: Html\n语言: Html\n关键词: Href, Html, Target, Page, Com\n实体数: 13\n\n# HTML 链接\r\n\r\n**来源**: sample/html-links\r\n\r\n**分类**: 链接和媒体\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 基本语法\r\n\r\n```html\r\n链接文字\r\n```\r\n\r\n## target 属性\r\n\r\n```html\r\n\r\n当前窗口\r\n\r\n\r\n新窗口\r\n\r\n
